info.name: ZeroQue Platform API
info.description: Complete API Collection for ZeroQue Platform - 21 Services with 280+ Endpoints

item.name: 1. Provisioning Service (8000) - 17 endpoints
item.description: Tenant, site, store, user, role, vendor, cost centre management

item.name: 2. Catalog Service (8001) - 12 endpoints
item.description: Product, variant, category, bundle, search management

item.name: 3. Orders Service (8002) - 7 endpoints
item.description: Order creation, retrieval, updates, deletion

item.name: 4. Pricing Service (8006) - 6 endpoints
item.description: Pricebook, pricing rules, price calculation

item.name: 5. Approvals Service (8084) - 20 endpoints
item.description: Multi-level approval workflows, chains, requests, events, audit

item.name: 6. Subscriptions Service (8212) - 12 endpoints
item.description: Plans, features, subscriptions, renewals, cancellations

item.name: Add Feature to Plan (set plan_code variable)
7. Payments Service (8213) - 20 endpoints
item.description: Stripe, trade accounts, refunds, webhooks, currency conversion

item.name: 8. Entry Service (8218) - 7 endpoints
item.description: Entry code generation, validation, QR codes

item.name: 9. Ledger Service (8086) - 22 endpoints
item.description: Double-entry accounting, balances, reports, audit logs

item.name: 10. Billing Service (8214) - 20 endpoints
item.description: Invoice generation, settlements, disputes, cost centres, budgets, AR aging

item.name: 11. Notifications Service (8215) - 12 endpoints
item.description: Send notifications, history, replay, integrations (entry, user, order, invoice)

item.name: 12. Reports Service (8217) - 16 endpoints
item.description: Generate reports, analytics (sales, inventory, customers, operational), dashboards, Power BI embedding

item.name: 13. Usage Service (8219) - 3 endpoints
item.description: Record and track feature usage events

item.name: 14. Observability Service (8220) - 9 endpoints
item.description: Metrics collection, monitors, alerts, system metrics

item.name: 15. Monitoring Service (8221) - 8 endpoints
item.description: Health checks, service status, alerts

item.name: 16. Service Registry (8222) - 8 endpoints
item.description: Service discovery, registration, health tracking

item.name: 17. Entitlements Service (8223) - 6 endpoints
item.description: Check entitlements, record usage, cache management

item.name: 18. Identity Service (8224) - 16 endpoints
item.description: User management, roles, role assignments, tokens, OAuth

item.name: 19. Events Service (8085) - 19 endpoints
item.description: Event publishing, history, retry, queue metrics, subscriptions, integrations

item.name: 20. CV Connector (AiFi) Service (8216) - 22 endpoints
item.description: AiFi Computer Vision integration: entry codes, QR, card, biometric, webhooks, sync

item.name: 21. CV Gateway Service (8080) - 18 endpoints
item.description: CV device management, order processing, reviews, integrations with orders/approvals/billing
